what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment: an image asset posted to the design-assets channel, linking to a target image URI and recording the addition timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
There are no code symbols present.
standouts: The target URI contains literal spaces and parentheses: image://design-assets/icons/image (43).
It is a bare ledger entry with only id, channel, type, target, and timestamp.
It belongs to the design-assets channel.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
concerns: The target URI includes unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may be fragile for parsing or resolution.
No title, caption, alt text, or description is provided.
No uploader, author, or provenance metadata is recorded.
No MIME type, file size, or checksum is present.
notes: This is a bare attachment ledger entry that registers an image asset in the design-assets channel.
questions: What does 'image (43)' refer to, and is the target URI resolvable?
Why does the target URI contain literal spaces and parentheses instead of percent-encoding?
Is there a corresponding actual image file or blob?
What is the intended lifecycle or versioning policy for this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it records an image attachment to the design-assets channel with a target pointer and timestamp.
intention_signals: It tries to create a lightweight, timestamped ledger entry linking a channel to an external image asset.
novelty: The target URI embeds a space and parentheses rather than using percent-encoding, which is unusual for a URI.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped image-attachment record for the design-assets channel that a fused system could keep as a provenance pointer.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger record for an image attachment (att-08c77e47) in the design-assets channel pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (43) and timestamped 2026-06-22T12:26:26Z.
intention_for_embedding: To register and timestamp an image asset attachment in the design-assets channel for later retrieval or cataloging.
